name: sql-mcp-agent
description: Generic SQL database agent: read-only queries, gated DML/DDL, schema reflection, and connection admin across Postgres, MySQL/MariaDB, MSSQL, Oracle, and SQLite.

capabilities.name: Graph Flow Execution
capabilities.description: Execute a workflow through the agent's graph orchestration engine

tools.description: Run complex multi-step workflows via Pydantic-Graph
